title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac
jsonLd.description:
We at Kansai Nerolac are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
